results.justification: EXACT TWIN — E2P precomputed user-embedding injected via projection to soft-token prefix IS the pre-voyage compile e_chart + personal-key per-model interpretation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — prefix-tuning task-specific continuous-vector prefix IS the pre-voyage compile e_chart prefix mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — H-MEM 4-layer Domain+Category+Trace+Episode + index-routing IS the K=4 ocean-swell tier + 3-chart-type curricular memory mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — MACLA frozen-LLM external hierarchical procedural memory + meta-composition IS the pre-voyage e_chart + curricular hierarchy mechanism.
MemGPT tiered memory + main + recall + archive overlaps with K=4-swell-tier + island-anchor mechanism.
MIRIX multi-agent memory system + structured memory overlaps with personal-key per-model interpretation mechanism.
LEGOMem modular procedural memory + reusable memory units + workflow + multi-agent overlaps with 3-chart-type curricular pre-compile mechanism.
Comprehensive LLM agent memory evolution survey covers hierarchical + curricular + pre-compile mechanisms.
